metadata.description: Established Lone Star Tick (Amblyomma americanum) county counts by state. Used to drive the purple density layer.
metadata.source: CDC 2025 Lone Star Tick Surveillance (multiple 2025/2026 Excel releases) + Springer et al. 2014 + Ixodes pacificus 2026 data + NEON abundance + state reports (Missouri, Arkansas, etc.). Integrated from cdc_direct_downloads_2026 series.
metadata.notes: Major 2025 update: Many states now show near-complete establishment (especially Missouri, Midwest, South). Added Western expansion via Ixodes pacificus data. See recent cdc_direct_downloads JSONs for full source list. County-level precision work ongoing.

historical_notes.description: For future time-dynamic purple layer. Data from Springer et al. 2014 compilation is available in lone_star_tick_established_by_decade.csv
